intro: Welcome to the School. Today is your first day and you are the new student, talk to people!
objective: Collect 5 stamps to complete your English Passport.

zones.title: School Gate
zones.description: Choose the best greeting or farewell for each situation.

zones.title: Classroom Survival
zones.description: Read or listen and follow simple classroom instructions.

zones.title: Meet Your Classmates
zones.description: Build short dialogues, choose questions, and use polite expressions.

zones.title: My School Card
zones.description: Complete your profile and simple personal sentences.

zones.title: Final Passport Challenge
zones.description: Build your final introduction with valid blocks.
